title: Roasted Crisp French Mixed Berries Cassoulet
description: A charred and crisp French dish featuring frozen mixed berries, perfect for a unique dessert or snack. This egg-free friendly cassoulet is a great meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the thawed mixed berries, granulated sugar, and flour.
Add the melted unsalted butter, brine, lemon zest, and vanilla extract to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Roast the mixture in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is charred and crisp.
Remove the cassoulet from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the cassoulet warm, garnished with additional lemon zest if desired.
